details.title: 유사 멀티 에이전트 시스템 조사 및 개선점 도출
details.tier_reason: 외부 조사 + 분석 보고, Researcher 투입
details.description: 현재 하네스(Analyst-Generator-Validator 구조, 문서 기반 정책 관리)와 유사한 서비스를 조사하고 개선점을 도출한다.

spec.goal: 유사 서비스 벤치마크 후 개선 우선순위 제시
success_criteria: 각 서비스 대비 우리 하네스의 강점/약점 정리

details.confidence_rationale: 실시간 URL 크롤링 불가, 지식 기반 정보 활용. 핵심 아키텍처 개념은 안정적이나 세부 API는 미검증

summary: Document legacy JSON repair and Tier correction for research-only task

details.correction_reason: The original TASK_CREATED line had one extra closing brace, causing JSONL parsing to fail. Session log later documented this as a research-only task with no file changes, so the effective tier is Tier1 exception rather than Tier2.
details.json_repair: Removed one trailing extra closing brace from line 1 to restore the original TASK_CREATED event.
details.legacy_spec_omission_reason: Legacy pre-SSOT task preserved its spec inline in TASK_CREATED.details.spec.

summary: Close legacy research-only task based on preserved session log outcome

details.summary: Researcher survey completed with MEDIUM confidence and four improvement priorities recorded in SESSION-20260426-024.
details.branch_omission_reason: Research-only task with no file changes; later policy clarified this as a Tier 1 exception.
details.validation_omission_reason: Tier 1 research-only task; Analyst session review based on preserved Researcher result.
details.quality_score_skipped_reason: Legacy research-only task; no report requested at the time and no product/runtime changes.
